scripts.db:migrate: bash scripts/with-infisical.sh bun run --cwd packages/db db:migrate
scripts.db:migrate:docker: bun run scripts/db/wait-for-libsql.ts localhost 8080 && DATABASE_URL=http://localhost:8080 bun run --cwd packages/db db:migrate
scripts.db:push: bash scripts/with-infisical.sh bun run --cwd packages/db db:push
scripts.db:studio: bash scripts/with-infisical.sh bun run --cwd packages/db db:studio
scripts.db:seed:owner: bash scripts/with-infisical.sh bun run --cwd packages/db src/seed-owner.ts
scripts.db:backfill-customers: bash scripts/with-infisical.sh bun run --cwd packages/db src/backfill-customers.ts
scripts.db:seed:preview-admin: bash scripts/with-infisical.sh bun run --cwd packages/auth src/seed-preview-admin.ts
scripts.jobs:dev: bash scripts/with-infisical.sh bun run --cwd packages/jobs dev
scripts.partykit:dev: bash scripts/with-infisical.sh bun run --cwd partykit dev
